prayer.title: 🕐️ Morning Prayer
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who gives strength to the weary and renews the spirit of the exhausted.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 118:25**: "Lord, save us! Lord, grant us success!"
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 21:5**: "The plans of the diligent lead surely to abundance."
prayer.intention: Guide my hands today as I build — let every line of code, every decision, every conversation serve Your purposes.
prayer.closing: Go in peace. Build with purpose. Return with gratitude.

weather.title: 🌤️ Weather
weather.summary: Lows 44-47°F in sheltered areas, up to 54°F in warmer locations. East winds 10-15 mph with gusts to 25 mph this evening. Cool morning, mild day ahead.

mre.title: 📊 MRE Trading
mre.thesis: Fear elevated at 37.5, sideways regime intact. No active signals — all assets in HOLD. Market volatility elevated at VIX 21.1, watch for oversold bounces.

relationship.title: 💕 Family Focus
recommendations: PRIORITY: Focus on repair. Acknowledge recent conflicts without defending.
Increase acts of service dramatically this week.
Create space for her to express frustrations without fixing.

highlights.summary: Gaza ceasefire holding but fragile — 14 Palestinian violations Feb 5-20, 113 total since October. Trump's Board of Peace meeting with Israeli FM Gideon Sa'ar praising October deal. Last Israeli hostage retrieved.
Massive funding round signals enterprise AI acceleration in 2026. 8 of Fortune 10 are Claude customers, 500+ enterprises spending $1M+ annually.
New industry-specific tools for investment banking, HR, design. Now connects to Google Drive, Gmail, DocuSign, FactSet. Causing software stock selloffs as AI threatens existing business models.
